cn: 你一边听音乐一边写作业。
explanation: 现在进行时 are doing 与 while listening 表同时进行的动作。

answers: You are doing your homework while listening to music.
You're doing your homework while listening to music.
You are listening to music while doing your homework.
You're listening to music while doing your homework.
steps.cn: 你一边听音乐一边写作业。

steps.prompt: 把主句改为一般疑问句（Are you doing…?）
answers: Are you doing your homework while listening to music?
Are you listening to music while doing your homework?
steps.cn: 你一边听音乐一边写作业吗？

answers: You are not doing your homework while listening to music.
You aren't doing your homework while listening to music.
You're not doing your homework while listening to music.
steps.cn: 你不一边听音乐一边写作业。

steps.prompt: 对「your homework」提问（问"在做什么"）
answers: What are you doing while listening to music?
What are you doing?
steps.cn: 在做什么？

explanation: too small 表"太小"；一般过去时 was too small。

answers: This dress is too small.
The dress is too small.
This skirt is too small.
steps.cn: 这件裙子太小了。

answers: Is this dress too small?
Is the dress too small?
Is this skirt too small?
steps.cn: 这件裙子太小了吗？

steps.prompt: 改为否定句（用 not…enough 表达相反意义）
answers: This dress is not big enough.
The dress is not big enough.
This dress isn't big enough.
The dress isn't big enough.
steps.cn: 这件裙子不够大。

answers: How is this dress?
What is wrong with this dress?
What's wrong with this dress?
steps.cn: 怎样？

explanation: be going to have a picnic 表打算；at the seaside 表地点。

answers: We are going to have a picnic at the seaside.
We're going to have a picnic at the seaside.
We are going to have a picnic by the sea.
We're going to have a picnic by the sea.
steps.cn: 我们打算去海边野餐。

answers: Are we going to have a picnic at the seaside?
Are we going to have a picnic by the sea?
steps.cn: 我们打算去海边野餐吗？

answers: We are not going to have a picnic at the seaside.
We aren't going to have a picnic at the seaside.
We're not going to have a picnic at the seaside.
steps.cn: 我们不打算去海边野餐。

steps.prompt: 对「at the seaside」提问（问"在哪里野餐"）
answers: Where are we going to have a picnic?
steps.cn: 在哪里野餐？

cn: 这是店里最昂贵的型号。
explanation: 最高级 the most expensive model；in the shop 表范围。

answers: This is the most expensive model in the shop.
It is the most expensive model in the shop.
It's the most expensive model in the shop.
steps.cn: 这是店里最昂贵的型号。

answers: Is this the most expensive model in the shop?
Is it the most expensive model in the shop?
steps.cn: 这是店里最昂贵的型号吗？

answers: This is not the most expensive model in the shop.
This isn't the most expensive model in the shop.
It is not the most expensive model in the shop.
It isn't the most expensive model in the shop.
steps.cn: 这不是店里最昂贵的型号。

steps.prompt: 对「the most expensive model」提问（问"是什么型号"）
answers: Which is the most expensive model in the shop?
What is the most expensive model in the shop?
steps.cn: 这是什么型号？

explanation: 一般疑问句用 any change；have 表"有"。

answers: Do you have any change?
Have you got any change?
steps.cn: 你有零钱吗？

answers: You have some change.
You have got some change.
You've got some change.
steps.cn: 你有零钱。

answers: You do not have any change.
You don't have any change.
You have not got any change.
You haven't got any change.
steps.cn: 你没有零钱吗。

answers: What do you have?
What have you got?
steps.cn: 你有零钱吗有什么？

explanation: 一般过去时 heard；last night 作时间状语。

answers: I heard a knock at the door last night.
I heard someone knocking at the door last night.
steps.cn: 昨晚我听到了敲门声。

answers: Did you hear a knock at the door last night?
Did you hear someone knocking at the door last night?
steps.cn: 昨晚我听到了敲门声吗？

answers: I did not hear a knock at the door last night.
I didn't hear a knock at the door last night.
I did not hear anyone knocking at the door last night.
I didn't hear anyone knocking at the door last night.
steps.cn: 昨晚我没有听到了敲门声。

answers: When did you hear a knock at the door?
When did you hear someone knocking at the door?
steps.cn: 什么时候昨晚我听到了敲门声？

cn: 汤米早餐时把牛奶打翻了。
explanation: 一般过去时 spilled 表过去动作；at breakfast 作时间状语。

answers: Tommy spilled the milk at breakfast.
Tommy knocked over the milk at breakfast.
steps.cn: 汤米早餐时把牛奶打翻了。

answers: Did Tommy spill the milk at breakfast?
Did Tommy knock over the milk at breakfast?
steps.cn: 汤米早餐时把牛奶打翻了吗？

answers: Tommy did not spill the milk at breakfast.
Tommy didn't spill the milk at breakfast.
Tommy did not knock over the milk at breakfast.
Tommy didn't knock over the milk at breakfast.
steps.cn: 汤米早餐时没有把牛奶打翻了。

steps.prompt: 对「the milk」提问（问"打翻了什么"）
answers: What did Tommy spill at breakfast?
What did Tommy knock over at breakfast?
steps.cn: 汤米早餐时打翻了什么？

cn: 国王住在一座大宫殿里。
explanation: 一般过去时 lived 表过去状态；in a big palace 表地点。

answers: The king lived in a big palace.
The king lived in a large palace.
steps.cn: 国王住在一座大宫殿里。

answers: Did the king live in a big palace?
Did the king live in a large palace?
steps.cn: 国王住在一座大宫殿里吗？

answers: The king did not live in a big palace.
The king didn't live in a big palace.
The king did not live in a large palace.
The king didn't live in a large palace.
steps.cn: 国王住不在一座大宫殿里。

steps.prompt: 对「in a big palace」提问（问"住在哪里"）
answers: Where did the king live?
Where did the king live in the story?
steps.cn: 住在哪里？

cn: 一个戴帽子的男人一直在跟着我。
explanation: 过去进行时 was following 表当时持续进行的动作。

answers: A man in a hat was following me.
The man in a hat was following me.
steps.cn: 一个戴帽子的男人一直在跟着我。

answers: Was a man in a hat following you?
Was the man in a hat following you?
steps.cn: 一个戴帽子的男人一直在跟着我吗？

answers: A man in a hat was not following me.
A man in a hat wasn't following me.
The man in a hat was not following me.
The man in a hat wasn't following me.
steps.cn: 一个戴帽子的男人一直不在跟着我。

steps.prompt: 对「A man in a hat」提问（问"谁在跟着"）
answers: Who was following you?
Who was following me?
steps.cn: 谁在跟着？

cn: 我们下个月将飞往澳大利亚。
explanation: are going to fly 表计划；next month 作时间状语。

answers: We are going to fly to Australia next month.
We're going to fly to Australia next month.
We will fly to Australia next month.
We'll fly to Australia next month.
steps.cn: 我们下个月将飞往澳大利亚。

answers: Are we going to fly to Australia next month?
Will we fly to Australia next month?
steps.cn: 我们下个月将飞往澳大利亚吗？

answers: We are not going to fly to Australia next month.
We aren't going to fly to Australia next month.
We will not fly to Australia next month.
We won't fly to Australia next month.
steps.cn: 我们下个月不会飞往澳大利亚。

steps.prompt: 对「next month」提问（问"何时出发"）
answers: When are we going to fly to Australia?
When will we fly to Australia?
steps.cn: 何时出发？

explanation: will make 表将要做的动作；some tea 用于肯定语境。

answers: I will make some tea for you.
I'll make some tea for you.
I am going to make some tea for you.
I'm going to make some tea for you.
steps.cn: 我去给你泡些茶。

answers: Will you make some tea for me?
Are you going to make some tea for me?
steps.cn: 我去给你泡些茶吗？

answers: I will not make any tea for you.
I won't make any tea for you.
I am not going to make any tea for you.
I'm not going to make any tea for you.
steps.cn: 我不去给你泡些茶。

steps.prompt: 对「some tea」提问（问"将泡什么"）
answers: What will you make for me?
What are you going to make for me?
steps.cn: 我去将泡什么？

explanation: have been to 表经历；many countries 作宾语。

answers: She has been to many countries.
She's been to many countries.
steps.cn: 她去过很多国家。

answers: Has she been to many countries?
steps.cn: 她去过很多国家吗？

answers: She has not been to many countries.
She hasn't been to many countries.
She has never been to many countries.
steps.cn: 她不去过很多国家。

steps.prompt: 对「many countries」提问（问"去过哪里"）
answers: Where has she been?
How many countries has she been to?
steps.cn: 她去过哪里？
